title: Toyseum 8 x Silly Straw Glasses, Ideal Goody Bag Fillers for Kids, Fun Party Accessories for Boys & Girls, Unique Drinking Straws, Perfect Kids Party Favours, Pack of 8 Mixed Colours
features: MULTI-COLOURED SILLY STRAWS - Add some fun and laughter to your party and family gatherings with our playful novelty straw glasses. Consists of 8 fun colours including red, blue, orange, green, pink, yellow, hot pink and transparent, ideal as a gift or party bag filler, as well as using at home on nights in
WACKY FUN FOR ALL THE FAMILY - With 8 bright colours to choose from, enjoy our novelty party straw glasses with friends and family. Perfect for creating fun memories and picture taking

SIMPLE TO PUT TOGETHER - Simply attach the 2 tubes to each end of the glasses, wrap around each ear (important) and pop the long end into your glass whilst sucking the short end. Watch friends as their drink swirls around the bends and around their eyes as it travels through the straw
IDEAL FOR ANY COOL DRINK - Very versatile, these can be used with any cold or cool beverage, such as juice, milk, water, soft drinks, or any parents favourite tipple

PACK OF 8 - A perfect and unique addition as party bag fillers for boys and girls, each straw glasses comes in it's own sealed bag, not only keeps clean and is hygienic, but remains neat and tidy in a party bag and can also be given separately as a gift
HOW TO CLEAN - After each use, we recommend thoroughly rinsing each part through with warm soapy water. Keeps your straw drinking glasses clean and hygienic, ready for their next use
description: Product Description Straw Glasses Straw glasses come in a pack of 8 different colours. Red, blue, orange, green, pink, yellow, hot pink and transparent Party Bag Fillers Straw glasses make for a whimsical party favor, adding a playful touch to both boys' and girls' party bags. School Clubs Straw glasses are a playful activity to introduce fun into school-related clubs, kids' playtime, functions, expos, and more. Easy to assemble Simply attach the 2 tubes to each end of the glasses, wrap around each ear and pop the long end into your glass.
